# bufferIndex

**Instance Property**

The index of the vertex buffer containing data for this attribute in a mesh’s [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMesh/vertexBuffers] array.

## Declaration

```swift
var bufferIndex: Int { get set }
```

## Discussion

A mesh may store vertex data in either a *structure of arrays* model, where data for each attribute lies in a separate vertex buffer, or in an *array of structures* model. In the latter, multiple vertex attributes share the same buffer (and thus have the same [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVertexAttribute/bufferIndex] value), and the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVertexAttribute/format] and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVertexAttribute/offset] values (together with the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVertexBufferLayout/stride] value of a related [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVertexBufferLayout] object) identify which bytes in that buffer refer to which vertex attributes.

## Inspecting a Vertex Attribute

- **name**: An identifier for the semantic use of the vertex attribute.
- **format**: The format of per-vertex data for the attribute.
- **offset**: The offset, in bytes, of vertex data for the attribute in a vertex buffer, relative to the start of data for each vertex.
- **initializationValue**: The default value for vertex data for this attribute.
